occupation: Managing Director - Outdoorlink International at Outdoorlink
headline: Bringing strategic growth and optimization via technological solutions
summary:
I am a seasoned executive and leader with 20 years of success in the United States and Latin America across multiple industries. I have worked as an entrepreneur and in multinational corporations both with private and government stakeholders.

I am working to bring technological solutions to multiple industries across the Americas. The Digital Transformation of all industries is well underway and our solutions are a vital part of its future.

Tried and tested through multiple countries and cultures I have always found a way to lead my teams to success. Working to optimize and grow the companies I have worked for, I have turned to my managerial, M&A and cultural experiences to find successful solutions to unique problems. I was able to assist in creating leaders of industry whose potential was so evident they were sought after by competitors and investors.

I love tough problems and working with people from around the world. I have a personality that makes people feel welcome and allows them to seek me out for help or solutions. When my kids ask me what I do, I like to say Firefighter.

I have received scholarships and honors from undergrad and graduate universities as well as multiple recognitions from the organizations I have work for, but little compares to the culmination of a tough negotiation, a wonderful P&L and hugs from my children.

If I can be of service, please do not hesitate to contact me and if can’t help I may know someone who can.
